description: Curated resource links rendered by web/pages/resources.html (resources-app.js). Two contexts: 'real' (real-world help) and 'sim' (in-game guides). Each category has a name, an icon key (see assets/icons), and a list of resources. A resource has a name, a desc, and OPTIONALLY a url. A resource with no url is a guide that has not been written yet: the page renders it as an un-linked card with a 'Not written yet' tag rather than a link that goes nowhere. Add entries here, not in code (Infinite-of-X).
